# artie_column_hashing_salt (Data Source)

Reads an existing Artie Column Hashing Salt by UUID. Use this to reference a salt that was created outside of Terraform (e.g. via the Artie UI) from an `artie_pipeline`'s `column_hashing_salt_uuid`.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the column hashing salt to look up.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) A description of the salt's purpose.
- `name` (String) The human-readable name of the salt.
- `salt` (String, Sensitive) The salt value. This value is sensitive and will not be displayed in plan output.
